name: Shared — Global Error Handler
notes: Set this workflow as the Error Workflow in every production workflow's Settings tab. It catches all unhandled failures and notifies via Slack + WhatsApp.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: 'whatsapp', recipient_type: 'individual', to: $env.WHATSAPP_RECIPIENT_NUMBER, type: 'text', text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.whatsappText } }) }}

parameters.command:
=cd /app && python3 -c "
import psycopg2, os, json
conn = psycopg2.connect(os.environ['POSTGRES_URL'])
cur  = conn.cursor()
cur.execute(\"INSERT INTO agent_runs (agent_name, workflow_name, status, error_message, model) VALUES (%s, %s, 'error', %s, %s)\",
  ('n8n_error_handler', '{{ $json.wfName }}', '{{ $json.errMsg.replace("'", "''") }}', 'n8n'))
conn.commit(); cur.close(); conn.close()
"
